verses.1: The pronouncement concerning Moab: Certainly in a night Ar of Moab is devastated and ruined; Certainly in a night Kir of Moab is devastated and ruined.
verses.2: The people have gone up to the temple and to Dibon, to the high places to weep. Moab wails over Nebo and Medeba; Everyone’s head is bald and every beard is cut off.
verses.3: In their streets they have put on sackcloth; On their housetops and in their public squares Everyone is wailing, overcome with weeping.
verses.4: Heshbon and Elealeh also cry out, Their voice is heard all the way to Jahaz; Therefore the armed men of Moab cry aloud; His soul trembles within him.
verses.5: My heart cries out for Moab; His fugitives are as far as Zoar and Eglath-shelishiyah, For they go up the ascent of Luhith weeping; Indeed, on the road to Horonaim they raise a cry of distress over their collapse.
verses.6: For the waters of Nimrim are desolate. Indeed, the grass is withered, the new growth has died, There is no greenery.
verses.7: Therefore the abundance which they have acquired and stored up, They carry it off over the brook of Arabim.
verses.8: For the cry of distress has gone around the territory of Moab, Its wailing goes as far as Eglaim and its howling to Beer-elim.
verses.9: For the waters of Dimon are full of blood; I will certainly bring added woes upon Dimon, A lion upon the fugitives of Moab and the remnant of the land.
